meta.title: OnRamp: AI In OT & ICS Security
meta.description:
AI. There has to be a session on AI in the OnRamp. Out of the huge number of submissions we selected a session that will quickly go through the different types of AI in use today, provide an example in OT where this is a good fit, and discuss the strengths and weaknesses of each type.

Attend this session if you need help determining what type of AI you should be pursuing for a task or goal.

The OnRamp is S4's 101-Level Training Course. Check out the OnRamp playlist on the S4 Events Youtube Channel. This year's 5 sessions update the OnRamp training with topics that have become more important the last two years.
